The '''''Spiral''-class Assault Ship''' was a needle-shaped, single-use [[Boarding craft/Legends|boarding craft]] in use by the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]].

==Characteristics==
This small, unarmed [[Starship/Legends|vessel]] was a single-use craft designed to sneak up on an unsuspecting target and release a strike force directly onto the enemy vessel. Unlike other assault [[Shuttle/Legends|shuttles]], the ''Spiral''-class was completely unarmed, relying on its advanced stealth suite to allow the craft to achieve striking distance. Once the vessel reached its target's [[Particle shield/Legends|particle shields]], a one-use [[proton charge]] would explode, causing the target's [[Deflector shield/Legends|shields]] to weaken enough for the ''Spiral''-class to pass through.

Once through the shield, the Spiral smashed itself headlong into the target. The nose cone of the ''Spiral''-class was composed of [[tekonite]], which would vaporize upon collision, absorbing up to 92 percent of the damage. The resulting impact damage to the target ship allowed enemy forces to enter the vessel via hull breaches using [[Environment suit/Legends|vac-suits]].

The ''Spiral''-class was severely limited in cargo space; it had room for at least six passengers while the rear cargo compartment could only hold a droid and rations for two weeks.

==History==
Two ''Spiral''-class ships were captured by the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Alliance to Restore the Republic]], and were instrumental in the Rebel [[Battle for Black Ice|infiltration]] and capture of the ''[[Black Ice/Legends|Black Ice]]''.

==Behind the scenes==
The ''Spiral''-class assault ship is not pictured anywhere. A picture thought to be of it is almost certainly a [[H-60 Tempest bomber/Legends|H-60 Tempest Bomber]] from the same battle.

==Appearances==
*[[Black Ice (adventure)|''Black Ice'']]
